CustomField.formula: CASE( Status__c , "New", IMAGE("/resource/1712610540000/YellowButtonPNG?", "New",30,30), "Pending",IMAGE("/resource/1712610540000/YellowButtonPNG?", "Pending",30,30), "Approve with Changes", IMAGE("/resource/1712610585000/BlueButtonPNG?", "Approve with Changes",30,30), "Approved", IMAGE("/resource/1712610566000/GreenButtonPNG?", "Approved",30,30), "Rejected", IMAGE("/resource/1712610507000/RedButtonPNG?", "Rejected",30,30), IMAGE("/resource/1712610540000/YellowButtonPNG?", "Alert Only",30,30))
CustomField.label: Status Indicator
